narrative:
Precinct Geneva 5 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 365 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
